neighborhoods.name: Vieux Toulon
neighborhoods.description: Revitalized old town with provencal market, Cours Lafayette, and pedestrian streets near the naval harbor
neighborhoods.character: Provencal market town, naval heritage, revitalizing

housing.predominantType: Apartments in provencal buildings and renovated townhouses

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Toulon. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Le Mourillon
neighborhoods.description: Charming beach neighborhood east of center with village atmosphere, beaches, and botanical garden

housing.predominantType: Apartments and villas near the beaches

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Toulon's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: La Seyne-sur-Mer
neighborhoods.description: Former shipyard town across the harbor with lower costs and improving waterfront development
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Sanary-sur-Mer / Bandol
neighborhoods.description: Picturesque fishing villages west of Toulon with provencal charm and international residents

housing.predominantType: Provencal villas, apartments, and waterfront properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
